title: sorghum nutans subvar. agrostoides
intro: Sorghum nutans subvar. agrostoides, also known as the perennial sorghum or Johnson grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Asia and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sorghum nutans subvar. agrostoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
